title: Methanol and Renewable Solutions for Transportation: Comprehensive Forecasting Analysis for Energy Planning
description_es: Este trabajo propone métodos de predicción exhaustivos para evaluar el potencial del metanol y soluciones renovables en sistemas de transporte.

publication.venue: 2024 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN)

abstract: Renewable energy adoption in transportation requires accurate forecasting of alternative fuels like methanol. This paper presents comprehensive forecasting analysis comparing methanol with other renewable solutions, providing critical insights for energy planning and policy development.

citations.apa: Méndez, D., González, J. J., & Herrera, F. (2024). Methanol and Renewable Solutions for Transportation: Comprehensive Forecasting Analysis for Energy Planning. In 2024 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN). IEEE.
citations.mla: Méndez, David, et al. "Methanol and Renewable Solutions for Transportation: Comprehensive Forecasting Analysis for Energy Planning." 2024 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN), IEEE, 2024.
